headline: Is CrowdStrike (CRWD) One of the Best Trending AI Stocks to Watch in 2026?
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:CRWD) is one of the best trending AI stocks to watch in 2026. In collaboration with Amazon Web Services (AWS), CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:CRWD) announced on June 17 new AI, cloud, and Next-Gen SIEM innovations that allow organizations to securely build, deploy, and operate AI applications and cloud workloads on AWS. headline: The Old-School Signal That Lit Up Palo Alto Networks Stock
summary: While all eyes were on a futuristic AI platform, the most telling clue to the stock's takeoff lay buried in the company's oldest business.
